claim: Cross-check verification failed due to invalid JSON output from cross-checker agent, preventing independent confirmation of explorer claims. Explorer evidence appears thorough but cannot be independently verified without cross-check.

evidence.summary: Cross-checker agent output file contains invalid JSON wrapped in markdown code blocks (```json...```)
evidence.why: This confirms the cross-checker failure is due to output format error, not content disagreement.

evidence.summary: Explorer evidence cites VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES definition at line 16
evidence.why: Evidence record is specific and verifiable with line number.

evidence.summary: Explorer evidence cites doctrine stating external evidence cannot prove target-project facts alone
evidence.why: Documentation evidence supports the core claim about scope separation.

assumptions: Explorer line number citations are accurate despite inability to independently verify all claims due to cross-checker failure
WebFetch/WebSearch tools function as documented in agent prompts when available
risks: Without successful cross-check, there is no independent verification of the explorer claim that acceptance criteria are already implemented
If any explorer evidence has incorrect line numbers or misinterpreted code, the claim may be weaker than stated
Cross-check JSON format error may recur if root cause in prompt or agent setup is not addressed
missing: Independent cross-check verification of explorer evidence due to cross-checker JSON output format failure
Verification that line numbers cited (16, 151-158, 273-276, 382-406, 408-412, 421-436, 513-530, 566-597) accurately correspond to claimed code elements
Verification that docs/yolo-demand-doctrine.md line 70 contains the cited doctrine text

result.notes: Cross-checker agent failed with EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON error (output wrapped in markdown code blocks instead of pure JSON). Evidence policy requires cross_check for high-risk facts. Explorer evidence is thorough with 10 records, specific paths, and line numbers, but independent verification did not complete. Blocker should remain until cross-check succeeds or evidence policy is reconsidered. Root cause of JSON format error needs investigation before retry.
